title: Labirinth
description: Labirinth is a PVP ressource pack desined to be modern and fun to play!
body:
![Labirinth text logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0184dd2dd8bcd673d4366852e3f9dfa473f1cdbf.png)

### Labirinth is a PVP ressource pack desined to be modern and fun to play!

Original assets by Netix. I wasn't able to found him - but he should be on discord. I edited some of them, and work on updating the pack with the new block and the future ones.
